mapper.select: SELECT worker_id, role, pid, hostname, CASE WHEN status = 'STOPPED' THEN 'STOPPED' WHEN last_seen_at < NOW() - ((heartbeat_interval_seconds * 3 + 10) * INTERVAL '1 second') THEN 'STALE' ELSE 'ONLINE' END AS computed_status, to_char(started_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS started_at, to_char(last_seen_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_seen_at, heartbeat_interval_seconds, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at))::bigint AS seconds_since_seen, metadata::text AS metadata FROM hub_worker_heartbeat WHERE status != 'STOPPED' AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' ORDER BY CASE role WHEN 'consumer' THEN 1 WHEN 'recovery' THEN 2 WHEN 'http' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, worker_id
